title: Xylem inoculation with flg22
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3guqo","text":"Protocol can be used after: Plant Infection with Xanthomonas Campestris Campestris","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":49,"length":23}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4ocr8","text":"\n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aloqe","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"3e7tn","text":"Depending on the country, X. campestris may be an quarantine organism. Please make sure you follow the specific guidelines of your country. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"dlcbl","text":"sthree-week-old Brassica oleracea plants in climate chamber","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"csn70","text":"Needle ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aos8n","text":"1 uM flg22 at room temperature ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place 15 µL of flg22 3 cm above the lesion on the central vein of the leaf.
With the needle puncture through the droplet into the central vein three times. Do not puncture the leaf completely. Due to a difference in pressure, the droplet should be sucked into the xylem.
Place a second 15 µL of flg22 3.5 cm above the lesion on the central vein of the leaf.
creator: Cleo B.
